title: Winter Drop Ruined
description: Adds the Krakentilus boss, 2 new Nautilus variants, and some spear related content
body:
![Krakentilus](https://i.ibb.co/kVVq1YxY/krakentilus.png)

The Mounts of Mayhem is one of the coolest updates yet ;D This mod adds some funny stuff inspired by it.

The mod is **balanced for survival**.

Video:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/B0Wr7P_Gd0E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>



# Features:
![Krakentilus](https://i.ibb.co/FqKXV2vH/krakentilus-2.png)

- Krakentilus - a boss, found hidding in its shell form on the sea floor*
- Has 4 attacks - charging, whirling, drowning and summoning tentacles
- It drops its shell upon defeat
- Has a custom boss bar

*if not attacked for 8 minutes it will despawn

![Krakentilus Shell](https://i.ibb.co/99zRP8vm/krakentilus-shell.png)

- Krakentilus Shell - it can be worn as a chestplate (7 armor, +40% swimming speed and +4 HP)

![Puffer Nautilus](https://i.ibb.co/vxyR2f8R/puffer-nautilus.png)

- Puffer Nautilus - a spiky Nautilus variant, can be tamed with raw fish and ridden with a saddle. Has a dash ability while ridden (default key: Space)

![Creeper Nautilus](https://i.ibb.co/TMX24P6W/creeper-nautilus.png)

- Creeper Nautilus - a rare hostile Nautilus - its explosion deals less damage than vanilla creeper. It drops the Wet Gunpowder

![Wet TNT](https://i.ibb.co/RGhjcFTy/wet-tnt.png)

- Wet TNT - it releases water instead of exploding. Crafted with the Wet Gunpowder. Can be "ignited" with the Shell and Steel

![Shell](https://i.ibb.co/n8nH07Zd/shell.png)

- Shell - can be found on sandy beaches. It is required for the Shell and Steel

![Spearcrafting Table](https://i.ibb.co/XxzS3882/spearcrafting-table.png)

- Spearcrafting Table - lets you craft all the spears from the mod. It has the recipes shown inside its GUI

![Iron Spear](https://i.ibb.co/d4FSffm8/iron-spear.png)

- Iron Spear - longer range that Iron Sword and slower attack

![LONG Iron Spear](https://i.ibb.co/x8JZW6x8/long-iron-spear.png)

- LONG Iron Spear - much bigger range* and much slower attack

*its range can be changed in the config file

![Ice Spear](https://i.ibb.co/TD0zFmtS/ice-spear.png)

- Ice Spear - same as Iron Spear but can be right-clicked to shoot a freezing projectile which will freeze mobs and blocks on its path (gives 2 seconds of Slowness III to mobs and puts them in Ice Cubes)

![Frozen Blocks](https://i.ibb.co/dJwcd9QM/frozen-blocks.png)

- Frozen blocks - variants of multiple basic blocks created by the Ice Spears's ability

# Requirements
No additional mods required
# Config

In the config file you can specify:

- each mob's spawn chance
- Puffer Nautilus' dash cooldown
- LONG Iron Spear's range bonus
# Donation
https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond
# Modpacks

Yeah, you can use it in your modpack! 😇
